name: Hangzhou Seck Intelligent Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Seck Intelligent Technology Co.,Ltd. primarily manufactures and processes meter reading system products and rotor wet long-distance cold water meters. The company engages in the electronic computer and system integration, and technology development, as well as technical development of smart water meter systems and software, and water automation and information systems. It is also involved in the installation of intelligent water meters and meter reading systems; wholesale and retail of electronic products, instruments, and water supply equipment; and import and export of goods. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
